name: LessonMatch
goal: Drill term-definition or any-to-any pairing through clickable two-column matching — a strong recall-reinforcement primitive.
description: Renders two columns of buttons. Learner clicks one item on the left, then one on the right; correct pairs lock in green and disable, wrong pairs flash red and clear the selection. The right column is shuffled deterministically so the order does not encode the answer. After every pair is matched, the host gets the submitted attribute and lesson-match-complete fires once with the attempt count. lesson-match-pair fires on every click-pair attempt with { left, right, correct }. Accepts pairs as a JSON [{ left, right }, ...] attribute or property.

props.name: pairs
props.description: JSON array of pair objects. Each {left, right} defines one correct match.

props.name: leftLabel
props.description: Optional column header above the left column.

props.name: rightLabel
props.description: Optional column header above the right column.

props.name: submitted
props.description: Auto-set to true after every pair has been matched. Disables further interaction.

events.name: lesson-match-pair
events.detail: { left: string; right: string; correct: boolean }
events.description: Fires on every left+right click pair. correct=true when the pair is a defined match.

events.name: lesson-match-complete
events.description: Fires once when every pair has been matched. attempts counts every left+right click pair (including wrong ones).

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Clears matched + wrong + submitted state and the attempts counter.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-5
cssVariables.description: Card horizontal padding + item horizontal padding (with --ce-space-4).

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-4
cssVariables.description: Card vertical padding + grid column gap + item horizontal padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Header bottom margin + result top margin + grid row gap + item vertical padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-inverse
cssVariables.description: Selected / correct / wrong item text color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-xs
cssVariables.description: Column-label font size + result font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Selected item background and hover border.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-green
cssVariables.description: Correct item background + result text color.

sideEffects.description: Tracks selected items, matched pairs, last wrong pair, attempt count, and submitted state.
sideEffects.reason: Required to render selection and lock matched pairs without re-rendering wrong rows after the next click.
